headline: Is Meta Platforms (META) Still Reasonably Priced After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Meta Platforms is still reasonably priced after such a strong multi year run, this article walks through how its current share price lines up against several valuation checks. The stock last closed at US$653.56, with returns of 2.6% over 7 days, an 8.8% decline over 30 days, 0.5% year to date, 0.1% over 1 year and a very large gain of 255.9% over 3 years and 157.8% over 5 years. Recent headlines have continued to focus on Meta Platforms' push in areas like...
